name: TABLE TRAC INC
summary: Table Trac, Inc. is a Nevada corporation that develops and sells proprietary casino management systems (CasinoTrac) and table games management systems. Products include modules for player tracking, kiosk promotions, vault/cage controls, slot machine interface boards, and audit/accounting tools. The Company serves over 115 casino operators in 300+ casinos across the U.S., Australia, Caribbean, and Central and South America, offering systems via purchase with monthly license and maintenance contracts.

products.name: Table Trac System
products.description: Patented real-time system that automates and monitors casino table game operations.

products.name: CasinoTrac Casino Management System (CMS)
products.description: End-to-end casino resort system for guest rewards, loyalty marketing, vault/cage management, and accounting.

products.name: DataTrac
products.description: Data management module for casino operations.

products.name: KioskTrac
products.description: Kiosk-based promotion and player tracking system for casinos.

products.name: KioskTrac Mobile
products.description: Mobile version of the KioskTrac kiosk promotion platform.

products.name: SlotSUITE
products.description: Suite of tools for slot machine management within the casino ecosystem.

products.name: RePrintEnroll Kiosks
products.description: Kiosks supporting reprint and enrollment functions for casino patrons.

products.name: Slot Machine Gaming Machine Interface Boards
products.description: Proprietary interface boards designed and manufactured by Table Trac using third-party assembly firms.
